title: Add testing
body:
- Add Makefile and targets: lint and unittest
 - unittest target will fail if test coverage falls below 50%
   - This number will be increased into the 90% ASAP
 - pylint configuration for project included
 - Source updated to eliminate all pylint Errors
 - Currently pylint Warning are reported but not gating
 - Renamed client to api_connection to align with HTTPConnection
 - Tests added as samples and to obtain 55% coverage

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
